description: VERIFIED LIVE: edX via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. edX renders each result as a course link (href containing /learn/), so this tool reads the course list straight from the DOM of your open edX tab. Navigate the tab to an edX search or subject page (edx.org/search?q=… or a /learn/<subject> listing) and let it load, then call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code on a search: 22 courses with course url and title extracted correctly (the title text also includes the school/partner name).

tools.name: edx_courses
tools.description: Courses on the current edX search or listing page (edx.org/search?q=… or a subject page). Navigate the tab there and let it load first. Returns each course's title (text may include the school/partner) and course url. VERIFIED (22 courses).
